learning_methods.name: The Visual Overview
learning_methods.objective: Gain a high-level visual and auditory understanding of the concept.

learning_methods.name: The AI Concept Breakdown
learning_methods.objective: Clarify specific technical nuances and get immediate code examples.
learning_methods.prompt: Explain the concept of {tip} to me as if I am a junior fullstack developer. Provide one 'bad' code example and one 'best practice' code example.

learning_methods.name: The Documentation Deep-Dive
learning_methods.objective: Read authoritative sources for edge cases and technical specifications.

learning_methods.name: The Knowledge Retention Quiz
learning_methods.objective: Test memory and logic using active recall and AI-generated scenarios.
learning_methods.prompt: Act as a senior lead developer. Generate 5 challenging multiple-choice questions about {tip} that focus on real-world debugging scenarios. Do not show answers until I respond. Ask One Question by One

learning_methods.name: The Feynman Teaching Method
learning_methods.objective: Simplify the concept to ensure there are no gaps in your logic.
learning_methods.prompt: I am going to explain {tip} to you. Please act as a critical student and ask me two 'why' questions that challenge my explanation to see if I truly understand it.

learning_methods.name: The Peer Solution Review
learning_methods.objective: Compare your approach with expert-level implementations.
learning_methods.prompt: Search for open-source repositories or challenges using {tip}. Analyze a solution that is different from yours and identify one optimization they used.
